summary: Completed testing of P0 (Super Admin Approval Flow) and P1 (KeyError mobile) fixes. Found and fixed additional bug: frontend admin components had double /api prefix in API URLs causing 404 errors.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: Frontend admin components (TherapistApplications.js, TherapistManagement.js, ClientManagement.js) had double /api prefix in API URLs (e.g., ${API}/api/admin/... instead of ${API}/admin/...) causing 404 errors

critical_code_review_comments: The API constant in App.js is defined as ${BACKEND_URL}/api, so all API calls should use ${API}/endpoint not ${API}/api/endpoint
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test therapist applications during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 and P1 fixes verified working. Super admin can login, view/approve/reject therapist applications, manage therapists (suspend/activate), and manage clients. Approved therapists can login with mobile number. Fixed double /api prefix bug in frontend admin components.
